ntracts/interfaces/IERC20Metadata.sol":{"keccak256":"0x13e223cf667d3bb72a753e4d518a9c00ca4c9270660c5a3a4263f796fef8c165","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://664ec535f6ade7778f73c1f1443e5d043529e703fe99a6aeb075d0a8cf1604f7","dweb:/ipfs/QmQFDgJUe7hKPD8JCnRXqQVTnW1uu98oUAn1XWWeFRwMfJ"]},"contracts/interfaces/IERC4626.sol":{"keccak256":"0x919f1cb32910d3e25051648a0e190f22569433c2798df2b42e1166693ecb616c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://41a852d3024cfe6ac03381080ea264563fc7f21ab74bf61f5f802ff6111413da","dweb:/ipfs/QmQjAShug5sHDR1TzQJperFbgsdcRT4Hkuhbh4RPFa5Vig"]},"contracts/interfaces/IERC4626Errors.sol":{"keccak256":"0xc38357f72bcc465d7368894a31f81a99691c913f1816ccbafef2855e60238d69","license":"AGPL-3.0-or-later","urls":["bzz-raw://bd442f07da08982c9f76a4e94731e114118ba1f5114f64dc38f8c2eacb6cc23c","dweb:/ipfs/QmP27QCoMxg2Duy4AkycAz6KNyEVDRwmoUKR2Zg82g45ne"]}},"version":1}

addLiquidityToBuffer(address,uint256,uin.details: Requires the buffer to be initialized beforehand. Restricting adds to proportional simplifies the Vault code, avoiding rounding issues and minimum amount checks. It is possible to add unbalanced by interacting with the wrapper contract directly.

params.exactSharesToIssue: The amount of shares that `sharesOwner` wants to add to the buffer, in underlying token decimals
params.maxAmountUnderlyingIn: Maximum amount of underlying tokens to add to the buffer. It is expressed in underlying token native decimals
params.maxAmountWrappedIn: Maximum amount of wrapped tokens to add to the buffer. It is expressed in wrapped token native decimals
params.wrappedToken: Address of the wrapped token that implements IERC4626

returns.amountUnderlyingIn: Amount of underlying tokens deposited into the buffer
returns.amountWrappedIn: Amount of wrapped tokens deposited into the buffer

initializeBuffer(address,uint256,uint256.details: Calling this method binds the wrapped token to its underlying asset internally; the asset in the wrapper cannot change afterwards, or every other operation on that wrapper (add / remove / wrap / unwrap) will fail. To avoid unexpected behavior, always initialize buffers before creating or initializing any pools that contain the wrapped tokens to be used with them.

params.exactAmountUnderlyingIn: Amount of underlying tokens that will be deposited into the buffer
params.exactAmountWrappedIn: Amount of wrapped tokens that will be deposited into the buffer
params.minIssuedShares: Minimum amount of shares to receive from the buffer, expressed in underlying token native decimals
params.wrappedToken: Address of the wrapped token that implements IERC4626

returns.issuedShares: the amount of tokens sharesOwner has in the buffer, denominated in underlying tokens (This is the BPT of the Vault's internal ERC4626 buffer.)

params.exactSharesToIssue: The amount of shares that would be minted, in underlying token decimals
params.wrappedToken: Address of the wrapped token that implements IERC4626

returns.amountUnderlyingIn: Amount of underlying tokens that would be deposited into the buffer
returns.amountWrappedIn: Amount of wrapped tokens that would be deposited into the buffer

params.exactAmountUnderlyingIn: Amount of underlying tokens that the sender wishes to deposit into the buffer
params.exactAmountWrappedIn: Amount of wrapped tokens that the sender wishes to deposit into the buffer
params.wrappedToken: Address of the wrapped token that implements IERC4626

returns.issuedShares: The amount of shares that would be minted, in underlying token decimals

params.exactSharesToRemove: The amount of shares that would be burned, in underlying token decimals
params.wrappedToken: Address of the wrapped token that implements IERC4626

returns.removedUnderlyingBalanceOut: Amount of underlying tokens that would be removed from the buffer
returns.removedWrappedBalanceOut: Amount of wrapped tokens that would be removed from the buffer

addLiquidityToBuffer(address,uint256,uin.notice: Adds liquidity proportionally to an internal ERC4626 buffer in the Vault.

initializeBuffer(address,uint256,uint256.notice: Adds liquidity for the first time to an internal ERC4626 buffer in the Vault.

queryAddLiquidityToBuffer(address,uint25.notice: Queries an `addLiquidityToBuffer` operation without actually executing it.

queryInitializeBuffer(address,uint256,ui.notice: Queries an `initializeBuffer` operation without actually executing it.

queryRemoveLiquidityFromBuffer(address,u.notice: Queries an `removeLiquidityFromBuffer` operation without actually executing it.
